note: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog — small excerpt for testing
title: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Remote Code Execution
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server contains a vulnerability allowing remote code execution via crafted requests.
vulnerabilities.notes: Actively exploited against manufacturing and critical infrastructure.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Server Remote Code Execution
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows Server 2022 contains a remote code execution vulnerability.
vulnerabilities.notes: Exploited in ransomware campaigns targeting manufacturing sector.

vulnerabilities.shortDescription: PostgreSQL contains a privilege escalation vulnerability affecting versions 15.0-15.3.
